task:
Shotcut is already open with /home/user/Documents/transition_project.mlt (1920x1080, 30 fps). Two short video files exist at /home/user/Videos/alpha.mp4 and /home/user/Videos/beta.mp4.

Place alpha.mp4 and beta.mp4 on the V1 timeline track so that beta.mp4's start overlaps the end of alpha.mp4 by about half a second, producing Shotcut's default dissolve transition in the overlap region. Save the project so /home/user/Documents/transition_project.mlt references both clips and contains a 'luma' transition (Shotcut's storage format for the default dissolve).

verification.description: alpha.mp4 is referenced in the project
beta.mp4 is referenced in the project
